自.wiki_summary: Originally depicted a nose; later borrowed to represent 'oneself; from'.

年.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound with 禾 (grain) as semantic component; originally meant 'harvest' before shifting to 'year'.

过.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: 辵 (walk) as semantic, 咼 as phonetic; original meaning 'to pass, go through'.

发.wiki_summary: Originally a pictogram of a bow firing an arrow; the phonetic component is 癹 (not 癶 as our note states), and the form is not from 殳.
发.difference: Our note cites wrong components (殳 semantic, 癶 phonetic); Wiktionary gives 癹 as the phonetic element with no 殳 involvement.

后.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound depicting a bound/lagging foot (幺 + 夊) with walking radical 彳, meaning 'behind/after'; our note's component analysis (人 + 口) is incorrect.
后.difference: Formation type matches, but our note wrongly describes the components as 人+口; Wiktionary shows the components are 彳, 幺, and 夊.

作.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: 亻 (person) as semantic, 乍 as phonetic component meaning 'to do/make'.
作.difference: Our type is compound_ideograph but Wiktionary classifies 作 as a phono-semantic compound (亻 semantic + 乍 phonetic).

里.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: 衣 (clothes) as semantic, 里 as phonetic; meaning 'inside, lining of a garment'.

用.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound formed by adding a handle to 同, which also serves as the phonetic component.
用.difference: Our type is pictograph (likened to a wooden bucket), but Wiktionary classifies 用 as a phono-semantic compound derived from 同.

道.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound combining 行 (street) and 止 (foot) as semantics with 首 as phonetic, meaning 'road/path'.

行.wiki_summary: Pictogram of a street intersection; later phonetically borrowed to mean 'to go'.
